prompt: List cancelled general liability policies effective in 2021 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Cancelled' and p.line_of_business = 'General Liability' and p.effective_date >= date '2021-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2022-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select gp.policy_id, gp.account_id, gp.carrier, gp.premium_amount, coalesce(sum(gp.retention_premiums), 0) as retention_premiums, c.risk_score, c.risk_score_label from policies gp join coverages cov on cov.coverage_id = gp.coverage_id join claims c on c.claim_id = cov.claim_id where cov.policy_id = gp.policy_id and cov.effective_date >= date '2021-01-01' and cov.effective_date < date '2022-01-01' group by gp.policy_id, gp.account_id, gp.carrier, gp.premium_amount, coalesce(sum(gp.retention_premiums), 0) as retention_premiums, c.risk_score, c.risk_score_label having abs(cgpRetentionRatio - 1.0) > 0.03 or coalesce(max(cgpRiskScore), 0) = 0 order by abs(cgpRetentionRatio - 1.0) desc, coalesce(max(cgpRiskScore), 0) desc, gp.policy_id, gp.account_id, gp.carrier;

pred: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, c.carrier_name, p.start_date as start_of_period, p.end_date as end_of_period, gp.group_name, pr.risk_score, r.effective_from, e.effective_to from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers c on c.carrier_id = a.carrier_id join groups gp on gp.group_id = a.group_id join risks pr on pr.risk_id = p.risk_id join enrollment_grants eng on eng.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id and eng.grant_type = 'Enrollment' join enrollments en on en.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id join users u on u.user_id = en.user_id where p.risk_policy_id = pr.risk_id and p.end_date >= date '2021-01-01' and p.end_date < date '2022-01-01' and (p.policy_status = 'Cancelled' or p.policy_status is null) and a.account_type = 'Business' and c.carrier_type = 'Telecommunications' and p.risk_score > 3 order by p.policy_id;

prompt: List expired professional liability policies effective in 2023 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Expired' and p.line_of_business = 'Professional Liability' and p.effective_date >= date '2023-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2024-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, c.carrier, p.start_date as policy_start, p.end_date as policy_end, coalesce(sum(pr.amount_paid - pr.recovery_amount), 0) as net_paid, sum(case when cp.risk_score >= 5 then -cp.risk_score else 0 end) as high_risk, sum(case when cp.risk_score < 1 then -cp.risk_score else 0 end) as low_risk, sum(cp.exposure * cp.risk_score / coalesce(max(pr.exposure), 0)) / nullif(coalesce(max(pr.exposure), 0), 0) as exposure_ratio, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers c on c.carrier_id = p.carrier_id left join claims claims_on_policy on claims_on_policy.claim_id = p.claim_id left join claim_protection cp on cp.claim_id = claims_on_policy.claim_id where p.policy_status = 'Expired' and p.policy_start <= date '2023-01-01' and p.policy_end >= date '2023-01-01' and (p.policy_status like '%paid%' or p.policy_status like '%paid%-%') and a.account_type = 'Professional' and c.insurance_company LIKE '%insurance%_%' and p.policy_id > 1000 order by p.policy_start desc;

prompt: List non-renewed property policies effective in 2023 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Non-Renewed' and p.line_of_business = 'Property' and p.effective_date >= date '2023-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2024-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, c.carrier, p.start_date as policy_start, p.end_date as policy_end, coalesce(sum(pr.amount_paid - pr.recovery_amount), 0) as net_paid, sum(case when cp.retention_ratio > 1 then cp.retention_ratio else 1 end) as retention_ratio, sum(cp.risk_score * p.net_paid) / nullif(sum(cp.risk_score), 0) as total_risk_score from policies p left join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id left join carriers c on c.carrier_id = a.carrier_id left join policies_premium_conversions ppcc on ppcc.policies_id = p.policy_id left join policy_conversions pc on pc.policy_id = p.policy_id left join customer_protection_insurance_computers cp on cp.computer_id = pc.computer_id where p.status = 'Renewed' and p.start_date <= date '2023-01-01' and p.end_date >= date '2023-01-01' and a.account_type = 'Individual' and a.account_status = 'Active' and c.carrier = p.carrier group by p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, c.carrier, p.start_date, p.end_date, coalesce(sum(pr.amount_paid - pr.recovery_amount), 0) null if (coalesce(sum(pr.amount_paid - pr.recovery_amount), 0)) = 0 order by total_risk_score desc, p.policy_id;

prompt: List active cyber policies effective in 2024 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Active' and p.line_of_business = 'Cyber' and p.effective_date >= date '2024-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2025-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select p.policy_id, p.policy_name, a.account_name, c.carrier, date_format(p.effective_date, '%Y-%m') effective_year, sum(pd.risk_score) as total_risk_score, sum(cp.risk_score) as total_critical_risk_score, sum(ep.risk_score) as total_exposure_risk_score, sum(pd.risk_score) - max(tpr.risk_score) as exposure_above_retention_ratio from policies p left join policies_accounts pa on pa.policy_id = p.policy_id left join accounts a on a.account_id = pa.account_id left join carriers c on c.carrier_id = a.carrier_id left join policies_critical_policies pd on pd.policy_id = p.policy_id left join policies_critical_policies cp on cp.policy_id = p.policy_id left join policies_exploitation_protection_policies ep on ep.policy_id = p.policy_id left join policy_tier_ratios tpr on tpr.policy_id = p.policy_id where p.active_at = '2024-01-01' and pa.account_status = 'Active' and pa.carrier = c.carrier group by p.policy_id, p.policy_name, a.account_name, c.carrier, date_format(p.effective_date, '%Y-%m') having total_risk_score > 0 or (total_risk_score = 0 and total_critical_risk_score > 0) order by total_risk_score desc nulls last;

prompt: List bound umbrella policies effective in 2024 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Bound' and p.line_of_business = 'Umbrella' and p.effective_date >= date '2024-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2025-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.effective_date as policy_start_date, p.expiration_date as policy_end_date, c.carrier_name, p.risk_score, (select sum(p2.amount) from policies_premiums p2 join policies p on p2.prd_id = p.prd_id where p2.prd_id = p.policy_id and p.premium_year >= 2024 - coalesce(max(pp.expiration_year), 0)) as total_premium, (select sum(rp.amount) from policies_premiums_ratio rp join policies p on rp.prd_id = p.prd_id where p.prd_id = p.policy_id and p.premium_year >= 2024 - coalesce(max(pp.expiration_year), 0)) as total_renewal_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score, p.carrier_name from policies p left join policies_premiums p2 on p.policy_id = p2.policy_id left join policies_premiums_ratio rp on p2.prd_id = rp.prd_id and p.policy_id = rp.prd_id where p.premium_year >= 2024 - coalesce(max(pp.expiration_year), 0) and p.coverage_type = 'Umbrella' order by p.policy_id;

prompt: List active professional liability policies effective in 2026 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Active' and p.line_of_business = 'Professional Liability' and p.effective_date >= date '2026-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2027-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, c.carrier_name, p.effective_date as policy_start_date, p.expiration_date as policy_end_date, p.risk_score, p.retention_ratio from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers c on c.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Active' and p.policy_effective_date >= date '2026-01-01' and p.policy_effective_date < date '2027-01-01' order by p.premium, p.policy_risk_score, p.policy_retention_ratio;

prompt: List bound property policies effective in 2026 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Bound' and p.line_of_business = 'Property' and p.effective_date >= date '2026-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2027-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select p.policy_id, p.policy_name, a.account_name, c.carrier, date_format(p.effective_date, '%Y-%m') effective_year, case when sum(l.risk_score) > 3 then 'High' when sum(l.risk_score) > 2 then 'Medium' when sum(l.risk_score) > 1 then 'Low' end risk_rating from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers c on c.carrier_id = a.carrier_id join policy_adjustments pa on pa.policy_id = p.policy_id left join claim_risk_lister l on l.claim_id = pa.claim_id where p.line_of_business = 'Bound Property' and p.effective_date >= date '2026-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2027-01-01' group by p.policy_id, p.policy_name, a.account_name, c.carrier, date_format(p.effective_date, '%Y-%m'), l.claim_id having count(DISTINCT l.claim_id) > 5 order by risk_rating, effective_year;

target: select a.account_id, a.account_name, a.headquarter_state, p.policy_number, p.written_premium, e.employee_name as underwriter_name, b.broker_name from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join broker_offices bo on bo.broker_office_id = pr.broker_office_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = bo.broker_id where a.headquarter_state = 'CA' and p.line_of_business = 'Property' and p.effective_date >= date '2021-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2022-01-01' order by a.account_name, p.policy_number;

pred: select p.professional_id, p.professional_name, p.address_1 || ' ' || p.address_2 as address, p.city, p.state as state, p.zip_code, p.contact_name as contact_father_name, p.contact_title as contact_father_title, p.contact_email as contact_email, p.contact_phone_number as contact_phone, sum(p3.cash_coverage_amount) as total_covers, u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name as full_name, b.first_name || ' ' || b.last_name as broker_first_name, b.associate_name as broker_associate_name from professionals p left join employees e on p.employee_id = e.employee_id left join users u on u.user_id = e.user_id left join brokers b on b.broker_id = p.broker_id where p.state = 'MA' and p.effective_date >= date '2022-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2023-01-01' group by p.professional_id, p.professional_name, p.address_1 || ' ' || p.address_2, p.city, p.state, p.zip_code, p.contact_father_name, p.contact_father_title, p.contact_email, p.contact_phone_number order by p.total_covers desc, p.professional_id;

pred: select p.account_id as account_id, p.account_name, a.address, p.subscribed_date, p.broker_name, b.first_name, b.last_name, po.policy_number from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join locations l on l.location_id = a.location_id join offices o on o.office_id = l.office_id join phone_numbers pn on pn.phone_number = o.phone_number join employees e on e.employee_id = p.employee_id join employee_phone_tables epT on epT.employee_id = e.employee_id join person_orders por on por.order_id = epT.order_id join brokers b on b.broker_id = por.broker_id join policy_obituaries PO on PO.policy_id = p.policy_id where p.account_type = 'Property' and p.subscribed_date >= date '2024-01-01' and p.subscribed_date < date '2025-01-01' and (a.headquarter_state = 'Ohio' or a.headquarter_state = 'OH') order by p.subscribed_date;

pred: select a.account_id, a.account_name, a.headquarter_state, p.policy_number, p.written_premium, e.employee_name as underwriter_name, b.brokerage_name from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join employees e on e.employee_id = p.underwriter_id join producers pr on pr.producer_id = p.producer_id join brokers b on b.brokerage_id = pr.brokerage_id where a.headquarter_state = 'NJ' and p.line_of_business = 'Commercial Auto' and p.effective_date >= date '2025-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2026-01-01' order by a.account_name, p.policy_number;

prompt: Summarize average retention ratio by carrier for policies effective in 2021.
target: select ca.carrier_name as carrier, avg(p.retention_ratio) as average_retention_ratio from policies p join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.effective_date >= date '2021-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2022-01-01' group by ca.carrier_name order by average_retention_ratio desc nulls last;
pred: select a.carrier, avg(c.retention_ratio) as avg_retention_ratio from policies p join carriers a on a.carrier_id = p.carrier_id join contracts c on c.carrier_id = a.carrier_id where p.effective_date >= date '2021-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2022-01-01' group by a.carrier order by avg_retention_ratio desc nulls last;
